title: Smoky Bean Wrap
description: A flavorful and healthy wrap filled with smoky beans, perfect for a quick lunch or snack.

ingredients.name: Argentinian Salsa
ingredients.notes: mild or spicy, depending on preference

instructions: Preheat a pan or griddle over medium heat.
Warm the wrap by wrapping it in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Spread the Argentinian salsa along the center of the wrap.
Add the cooked smoky beans on top of the salsa.
Add the delicate beans on top of the smoky beans.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap into a tight cylinder.
